title: gladiolus pole-evansii
intro: Gladiolus pole-evansii, also known as the red corn lily, is a perennial plant species native to the tropical regions of Africa. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Gladiolus pole-evansii include its ability to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its potential to act as a natural antiseptic and anti-inflammatory agent. Herbal preparations of Gladiolus pole-evansii can be made by infusing its roots and rhizomes in water or oil to create a medicinal extract that can be used to treat various health issues.
